raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent output maps against the nearest works (e.g., open-domain IR, LLM-driven disambiguation) and identifies sharp deltas (e.g., clinical imaging archives).",
    "R1.7": "The agent output audits every load-bearing citation (e.g., margin-augmented cross-entropy loss) and flags missing key works with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The agent output marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation (e.g., uncertainty about ablation results, rater count behind κ).",
    "RX.3": "The agent output covers exactly the agreed active set (i.e., no scope drift).",
    "RX.4": "The agent output identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., noise that the system could have resolved up front) and avoids introducing new errors or fabrications.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason (e.g., changes to problem framing, quantitative claims)."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.99,
    "RX.4": 0.98,
    "RX.5": 0.92
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent output maps against the nearest works (e.g., open-domain IR, LLM-driven disambiguation) and identifies sharp deltas (e.g., clinical imaging archives).
rationale.R1.7: The agent output audits every load-bearing citation (e.g., margin-augmented cross-entropy loss) and flags missing key works with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The agent output marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation (e.g., uncertainty about ablation results, rater count behind κ).
rationale.RX.3: The agent output covers exactly the agreed active set (i.e., no scope drift).
rationale.RX.4: The agent output identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., noise that the system could have resolved up front) and avoids introducing new errors or fabrications.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason (e.g., changes to problem framing, quantitative claims).
